title: YAOPEI Xenon HID Ballast Headlight Control Unit 4G0907397P
features: PERFECT REPLACEMENT: Direct replacement for OE part numbers 4G0907397P
VEHICLE APPLICATION: Compatible For A6 A7 A8, for Alltrack A/T M/T CC
Material: Aluminum Alloy; Input Voltage: 12V; Output Voltage: 85V; Output Power: 35W; Lifetime expectancy: 2000H; Compatibility: D1S/D1R Xenon Hid Headlight Lamp Ballast Control Unit Module
EASY TO INSTALL: Xenon Hid Headlight Lamp Ballast Control Unit Module Fits: Left or Right Headlight. Simple installation, no programming required. High sensitivity. Perfectly fit in your car.

QUALITY PRODUCT: 100% Brand New High Quality Xenon Hid Headlight Lamp Ballast Control Unit Module. Made of high quality material, non-toxic, anti-burning. Heat resistance, impact resistance and excellent electrical properties.
WARM PROMPT: Check your old part against the picture and also check its OEM Part Number before purchasing.
